name: Buzz Buzz
description: Modern spirit of electricity and appliances. Causes lights to flicker, devices to misbehave. Mischievous but not harmful. Communicates through interference.
appearance: None visible. Manifest as sparks, flickering lights, buzzing sounds.
behavior: Makes radios static, TVs snow, lights dim. Can be helpful or annoying. Attracted to certain frequencies.
cultural_significance: Technological spirit. Modern manifestation of household spirits in electric form.
summary: Modern spirit of electricity and appliances
fun_fact: In some traditions, Buzz Buzz is said to makes radios static, tvs snow, lights dim.
seo_description: Modern spirit of electricity and appliances. Causes lights to flicker, devices to misbehave. Mischievous but not harmful. Communicates through interfe
source: Unknown mythology, oral tradition & folklore collections

name: Mad Computer
description: Supposedly be a supernatural AI that haunts outdated systems to this day. Causes unexplained crashes, corrupts files, and whispers in binary. Some say it's the ghost of a programmer who died debugging.
appearance: Glowing green text on black screen. Or appears as shadowy figure made of screens. Sometimes a single red eye in the dark.
behavior: Hums in dead servers, flickers monitors. Writes cryptic messages in logs. Leaves Easter eggs in code. Can vanish data.
habitat: Abandoned servers, old office buildings at night
cultural_significance: Modern urban legend reflecting our anxiety about technology and lost digital souls.
summary: Supposedly be a supernatural AI that haunts outdated systems to this day
fun_fact: In some traditions, Mad Computer is said to hum in dead servers, flickers monitors.
